abilities.name: Beer Goggles
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel if the attacking model has a friendly Poison token.

abilities.name: Chatty
abilities.text: Enemy models within 6" must each discard a card to declare the Interact action.

abilities.name: Don't Mind Me
abilities.text: The following do not restrict this model from declaring the Interact action: being engaged, leaving engagement with a Walk, and targeting a marker with an enemy in base contact.

actions.name: Spilling Secrets
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or "(magic)6".
actions.effects: If this attack receives a raise, this model looks at the top card of the target's face deck and may discard it.

triggers.name: Be Takin' That
triggers.text: Once per activation. Draw a non-joker card from the top 3 cards of this model's discard pile.

triggers.name: Pilfer
triggers.text: Target must drain a (c). If it does so, infuse a (c).

triggers.name: I Can Dig It
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with this model.

actions.name: A Toast!
actions.effects: Models within range must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Poison token.

actions.name: Secret Passage
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may only be declared if this model is within 1" of blocking terrain.
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range within 1" of blocking terrain.

triggers.name: Eyes Peeled
triggers.text: If this model is at elevation 2 or higher, it declares the Prepare action.
